message:
Command `# ABC running (PID 311078), Yosys in pipe_read (reading ABC output).
# LibreLane in pipe_read - reading from Yosys. Normal state during ABC.
# Wait 30 min for ABC+netlist write+early PnR steps.
sleep 1800
echo "=== 30-min check: $(date) ==="
ps -p 363476 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
echo ""
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -15
echo ""
stat -c "log: %s bytes" /tmp/librelane_final.log
tail -4 /tmp/librelane_final.log` executed with exit code -1.
